description: Use this API to retrieve the comments for the specified file. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, comments = scenariofilegetcomments(sgroup, sfile)

parameters.name: sgroup
parameters.description: Group that contains the specified file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Name of the file whose attributes are to be retrieved. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: comments
return_values.description: The comment string for the specified file. use scenariofilelengthcomments to get required buffer size, if needed. (output).
